context.role: Echo consuming seeds from food bowl
context.screen_position: Center at x=64, y=60, head bobbing toward food bowl at x=16, y=100
context.usage_scenario: Triggered when player provides food; plays once then returns to idle; increases happiness by 15 points

visual_specification.shape: Same base cockatiel shape as idle, with head tilted downward toward food bowl
visual_specification.texture: Flat pixel art with no gradients; hand-drawn organic edges
visual_specification.outline: None; pure pixel art with color blocking

animation.description: Frame 1-3: head lowering toward bowl, Frame 4: beak open (2px wider), Frame 5: beak closed with seed, Frame 6: head raising back up

visual_specification.details: Beak opens to 5x3px in frame 4; head moves approximately 10px downward in frames 2-3; one seed (3x3px) disappears from bowl during animation

relationships.shared_with: Same body structure as all Echo states
relationships.differences_from: echo_idle (head position dynamic), echo_hungry (actively eating vs looking at bowl)
